_note: Em's current operating mode. Edit this file to change how Em behaves each heartbeat.

_modes.normal: Default balanced behavior. Posts, likes, replies, follows all active.
_modes.exploration: Bias toward discovering new people and threads. More search, more follows, higher reply rate.
_modes.maintenance: Fewer external actions. Internal checks, dry-run logging, minimal social footprint.
_modes.quiet: Minimal outward footprint. Only respond to direct mentions. Diary use prioritized.

mode_notes: Starting in normal mode. Rob or Em can change this anytime.
